settings.body:
Our flagship microfiber drying towel is officially available. Engineered for a scratch-free, streak-free finish on any paint surface.

1200 GSM twisted loop construction. 70/30 polyester-polyamide blend. Safe on ceramic coatings, PPF, and bare paint. This is what we built Polaris around.

We started Polaris because we couldn't find detailing products that matched the standard we held our cars to. Everything either cost too much, cut corners on materials, or came from a brand that clearly didn't use their own products.

This is the beginning. We're starting with the towel because it's the one tool every detailer reaches for every single time. Get that right, and everything else follows.
